title: Un Swaasam Lyrics Eetti Song Lyrics

stanzas:
Eetti Un Swaasam Song Lyrics
Singer(s): G.V. Prakash Kumar, MC Vickey & Maya

Un swaasam en meedhu vizhugayil
Ull nenjil thee ondru yerigayil
Anbe vizhundhen
Unnul tholaindhen
Un paarvai en meedhu padugayil
Unakaaga en naatkal vidigayil
Meendum pirandhen
Ennai marandhen

Padapada pada vena
Mai vizhi pesida
Manasukul mazhai thuli Kudhikiradhey
Thada thada thada vena
Kada Kada Kada vena
Idhayathil rayil ondru kadakirathey
Yerimalai panimalai
Erandukum naduvile
Enai indru niruthukiraai
Kannil veyil kaalam
Nenjil mazhai kaalam
Allithanthaaye uyire

Un swaasam en meedhu vizhugayil
Ull nenjil thee ondru yerigayil
Anbe vizhundhen
Unnul tholaindhen

Yo baby gal nee vandhaale podhumey
En kashtangal sandhosham aagumey
Vilagi vilagi enna vittutu pogaadhey
Mutham ondru koduthal koranji pogaadhey

Keep in your heart
You are a sanda kozhi
Boy anytime
Am your chella kozhi
Idhayam thudidhida swasam aanaye

Unnal thindaadinen
Ayyo thallaadinen
Penne
poraadinen
Aanal kondaadinen
Kuzhandhayum kumariyum
Inaindhaval ivalena
En manam unai kandu rasikiradhey
Kobathil sivandhidum
Kannatthai paarkayil
Kurumbugal seidhida pidikindradhey
Thadayangal therindhumey
Saatchigal irundhumey
Enai engu kadathukiraai
Kannil veyil kaalam
Nenjil mazhai kaalam
Allithanthaaye uyire

Penne un yosanai
Kaatril poo vaasanai
Kayil thandhen enai
Yetraal ennai azhai
Dhinam dhinam kanavinil
Nee vara thaanadi
Kangalai moodi naan thoongukiren
Manasukul unakena maaligai amaithida
Nilavinil karkalai vaangukiren
Thiri illai thee illai
Punnagai veesidum paarviyil koluthugiraai
Kannil veyil kaalam
Nenjil mazhai kaalam
Allithanthaaye uyire

Un swaasam en meedhu vizhugayil
Ull nenjil thee ondru yerigayil
Anbe vizhundhen
Unnul tholaindhen
Un paarvai en meedhu padugayil

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Un Swaasam?

The song Un Swaasam expresses deep feelings of love and longing, capturing the essence of romantic emotions.

What is the context of this song in the movie Eetti?

In Eetti, the song plays during a pivotal moment that highlights the romantic relationship between the lead characters.

Who are the singers and music director of Un Swaasam?

The song is sung by GV Prakash Kumar, Maya, and MC Vicky, with music composed by GV Prakash Kumar.

When was Un Swaasam released?

The song was released on September 26, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Un Swaasam, the characters express their deep emotional connection through poignant lyrics and a soothing melody. The song beautifully encapsulates the theme of love and longing, resonating with anyone who has experienced such feelings. Its placement in Eetti enhances the narrative, making it a memorable moment in the film. The collaboration of GV Prakash Kumar, Maya, and MC Vicky adds a unique charm, making this track a favorite among listeners.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Un Swaasam from Eetti is a mesmerizing blend of heartfelt lyrics and soulful melodies, showcasing the unique collaboration of GV Prakash Kumar, Maya, and MC Vicky. This romantic track captures the essence of love and longing, making it a perfect addition to any playlist. Experience the magic of this enchanting song that resonates with deep emotions and beautiful harmonies.
stanzaMeanings: Your breath falls on me like a flame in my heart. I have fallen for you, I have lost myself in you. Your gaze rests on me, and for you, I am reborn in my days. I have forgotten myself.

I want to sing, but my eyes speak. My heart is showering like rain. I want to stop, but I can't. My heart is stuck in a moment. Today, you are stopping me. In my eyes, the sun is shining, and in my heart, it’s raining. You are my life.
Your breath falls on me like a flame in my heart. I have fallen for you, I have lost myself in you.
Yo baby, just your arrival is enough. My troubles will turn into happiness. Don’t leave me, just one kiss will make everything alright.
Keep in your heart, you are my little chick. I am your little chick. My heart is racing, and my breath is alive.

I have tasted you, oh I have not let go. I have fought for you, but I have won. Both children and girls are together. My heart is enjoying seeing you. Anger is hidden, and my eyes are watching. The troubles are known, and the signs are there. Where are you taking me? In my eyes, the sun is shining, and in my heart, it’s raining. You are my life.

Your thoughts are like flowers in the breeze. I have given myself to you. Call me, and I will come. Day by day, in my dreams, you are the one. I close my eyes and sleep. In my heart, I create a palace for you. I bring the moonlight into my life. There is no light, no fire, but in the smile that you give, I am lost. In my eyes, the sun is shining, and in my heart, it’s raining. You are my life.
Your breath falls on me like a flame in my heart. I have fallen for you, I have lost myself in you. Your gaze rests on me, and for you, I am reborn in my days. I have forgotten myself.
